column8: Europa is larger than our own moon.
column9: It is now certain that there is a source of heat deep inside Europa.
column10: Scientists want to do research under Europa's surface.
column11: A trip to Europa would cost less than other planned missions.
column12: Scientists used to believe that light was necessary for life to exist.
column13: Although they can't see, the gaint worms still have eyes.
column14: There is some oxygen in Europa's atmosphere.
column15: Scientists are building bigger telescopes to view Europa.
